_help.allow_experienced_roles: false = only intern/new-grad/entry-level postings pass the fit gate (today's default). true = the fit gate also allows postings requiring 3+ years of experience — set by checking "Full time (3+ yrs exp)" in the Settings Levels submenu.
_help.ashby_company_slugs: Company slugs (from an Ashby job-board URL, e.g. jobs.ashbyhq.com/<slug>) to scrape directly via the Ashby API.
_help.lever_company_slugs: Company slugs (from a Lever job-board URL, e.g. jobs.lever.co/<slug>) to scrape directly via the Lever API.
_help.greenhouse_company_slugs: Company slugs (from a Greenhouse job-board URL, e.g. boards.greenhouse.io/<slug>) to scrape directly via the Greenhouse jobs API.
_help.smartrecruiters_company_slugs: Company identifiers (from a SmartRecruiters careers URL, e.g. jobs.smartrecruiters.com/<identifier>) to scrape directly via the public SmartRecruiters Postings API.
_help.simplify_feeds: Named SimplifyJobs GitHub listing feeds to pull from — see docs/SETUP.md for the supported feed names.
_help.workday_tenants: Workday tenant identifiers to scrape in review-only mode — see docs/SETUP.md for how to find a tenant string.
_help.oracle_tenants: Oracle Recruiting Cloud tenant identifiers ("<host>/<siteNumber>", e.g. eeho.fa.us2.oraclecloud.com/CX_45001 for Oracle's own careers site) to scrape directly via the public Fusion HCM REST API — see docs/SETUP.md.
